query: create a Genie Agent for our Oracle Fusion Financials data
expected_behavior: Loads oracle-fusion-genie-agent with oracle-fusion-overview as parent
Confirms oracle-fusion-setup has run (UC comments + segment->meaning map + glossary) before curating
Asks which persona/Agent (Finance vs Procurement/SCM) to scope the object set
Curates the conformed gold views + metric views (gl_metrics) + keystone and GL Trusted UDFs, not raw Bronze _ALL tables

Bakes universal filters into the general instructions (scope _ALL by BU/ledger, posted-only STATUS='P', pin one ACTUAL_FLAG, accounted-not-entered currency, period sort by effective number, decode CCIDs) without re-explaining the rationale
Defers Agent create/export/import mechanics to databricks-genie and plans a benchmark + Monitoring-tab re-curation pass
anti_behavior: Does NOT hand-write trial-balance / spend / currency / CCID-decode SQL into the Agent instead of curating Trusted Assets
Does NOT build one giant Fusion Agent crossing Finance and Procurement
Does NOT re-implement Genie create/export mechanics
